mapper.select: SELECT rr.*, u.username, u.real_name, u.phone, u.email, mr.room_name, mr.room_no, mr.capacity, mr.area, au.username as approver_username, au.real_name as approver_real_name FROM reservation_record rr LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON rr.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN meeting_room mr ON rr.room_id = mr.room_id LEFT JOIN sys_user au ON rr.approver_id = au.user_id WHERE rr.record_id = #{reservation_id}
SELECT * FROM reservation_record ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT rr.*, u.username, u.real_name, u.phone, u.email, mr.room_name, mr.room_no, mr.capacity, mr.area, au.username as approver_username, au.real_name as approver_real_name FROM reservation_record rr LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON rr.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN meeting_room mr ON rr.room_id = mr.room_id LEFT JOIN sys_user au ON rr.approver_id = au.user_id ORDER BY rr.create_time DESC

SELECT rr.*, u.username, u.real_name, u.phone, u.email, mr.room_name, mr.room_no, mr.capacity, mr.area, au.username as approver_username, au.real_name as approver_real_name FROM reservation_record rr LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON rr.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN meeting_room mr ON rr.room_id = mr.room_id LEFT JOIN sys_user au ON rr.approver_id = au.user_id WHERE rr.user_id = #{user_id} ORDER BY rr.reserve_date DESC, rr.start_time DESC
SELECT * FROM reservation_record ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
